name: gitlab-mcp-server
description: GitLab MCP server exposing 1027 self-managed GitLab REST/GraphQL MCP tools, or 1033 on GitLab.com Enterprise/Premium with Orbit. Includes a default 2-tool dynamic surface, 33 base / 49 self-managed enterprise / 50 GitLab.com Enterprise meta-tools, 46 resources, 37 prompts, 17 completion types, and 6 MCP capabilities (logging, progress, roots, sampling, elicitation, completions).
